import io
import string

fn update(_ v: Int, _ have: Bool, _ mx: Int, _ mn: Int) -> List<Int>
  if not have
    [1, v, v]
  else
    mut new_mx = mx
    mut new_mn = mn
    if v > mx
      new_mx = v
    end
    if v < mn
      new_mn = v
    end
    [1, new_mx, new_mn]
  end
end

fn flush(_ cur: String, _ have: Bool, _ mx: Int, _ mn: Int) -> List<Int>
  if string.len(cur) == 0
    if have
      [1, mx, mn]
    else
      [0, 0, 0]
    end
  else
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      update(v, have, mx, mn)
    when None
      if have
        [1, mx, mn]
      else
        [0, 0, 0]
      end
    end
  end
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut cur = ""
mut have = false
mut mx = 0
mut mn = 0

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      let r = flush(cur, have, mx, mn)
      match r.get(0)
      when Some(h)
        if h == 1
          have = true
          match r.get(1)
          when Some(a)
            mx = a
          when None
            ()
          end
          match r.get(2)
          when Some(a)
            mn = a
          when None
            ()
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      cur = ""
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let r = flush(cur, have, mx, mn)
match r.get(0)
when Some(h)
  if h == 1
    have = true
    match r.get(1)
    when Some(a)
      mx = a
    when None
      ()
    end
    match r.get(2)
    when Some(a)
      mn = a
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
when None
  ()
end

println("max=#{mx}")
println("min=#{mn}")
